tasks.title: Add new scenery types to constants
tasks.description: Add flower, sheep, horse, duck, and people to SCENERY_TYPES array and SCENERY_EMOJI map

tasks.title: Add new scenery to sidebar palette
tasks.description: Add 5 new palette-piece entries after the water entry in the sidebar
tasks.changes: Add HTML for flower, sheep, horse, duck, people palette items

tasks.title: Add new scenery to mobile drawer
tasks.description: Mirror the sidebar additions in the mobile bottom drawer
tasks.changes: Add HTML for flower, sheep, horse, duck, people in drawer-content

tasks.title: Add animal/scenery sound effects
tasks.description: Add SFX for sheep (baa), horse (neigh), duck (quack), and people (cheer). All Web Audio API synthesized.
tasks.changes: Add SFX.sheep(), SFX.horse(), SFX.duckQuack(), SFX.peopleCheer() methods

tasks.title: Expand proximity sound checks for all animals
tasks.description: Rename/expand checkCowProximity to checkAnimalProximity. Check for cow (moo), sheep (baa), horse (neigh), duck (quack), people (cheer) when train passes within 1 cell.
tasks.changes: Modify checkCowProximity → checkAnimalProximity with multi-type support

tasks.title: Add CSS animations for new scenery
tasks.description: Flowers: gentle sway like trees but smaller. Sheep/Horse: random flip like cow. Duck on land: subtle drift. People: subtle wave animation.
tasks.changes: Add CSS keyframes and classes for new scenery types, update renderCell

tasks.title: Update random generator scenery pool
tasks.description: Include new scenery types in addRandomScenery weighted random selection

tasks.title: Ensure night mode compatibility
tasks.description: All new scenery should be visible and appropriate in night mode. No special glow needed for animals/people.
tasks.changes: Verify renderCell handles new types in night mode

acceptance_criteria: AC1: All 5 new scenery types (flower, sheep, horse, duck, people) appear in both sidebar and mobile drawer palettes
AC2: Each new type can be dragged and placed on empty grid cells
AC3: Sheep makes a 'baa' sound when train passes within 1 cell
AC4: Horse makes a 'neigh' sound when train passes within 1 cell
AC5: Duck makes a 'quack' sound when train passes within 1 cell
AC6: People make a 'cheer' sound when train passes within 1 cell
AC7: Random generator places varied scenery including new types
AC8: All new scenery visible in both day and night modes
AC9: Flowers have gentle sway animation
AC10: Sheep and horse have random flip like cow
AC11: Palette is not cluttered — clear organization maintained
AC12: No regressions in existing scenery (tree sway, cow moo, house chimney smoke, water waves)
testing_focus: Place each new scenery type and verify emoji renders
Run Random → Play → verify new animal sounds fire near trains
Toggle day/night mode with new scenery on grid
Mobile drawer shows all new items with horizontal scroll
Right-click remove works on new scenery types
Undo/Redo works with new scenery placements
